description: Conceptual groupings for SciLayer published articles. Slugs must match content/articles/{slug}/metadata.json.

collections.title: ASRA — Foundations & Theory
collections.description: Architecture-level concept papers and pedagogical primers that frame the Adaptive Scientific Reasoning program before phase-specific implementation.

collections.title: ASRA — Phase Preprints (ARC Prize 2026)
collections.description: Cumulative phase articles for the nine-layer ASRA stack: experience → observation → memory → causality → goals → planning → robustness → biology bridge → integration.

collections.title: ASRA — Technical Specifications
collections.description: Implementation-oriented specs that complement phase concept papers with module boundaries, eval contracts, and deployment notes.

collections.title: Comparative & Position Papers
collections.description: External framework comparisons and synthesis essays that situate ASRA relative to adjacent research programs.

collections.title: Nature Foundation Models
collections.description: Organizational and scientific framing for Nature Foundation Models research themes.

collections.title: Platform & Industry Essays
collections.description: Essays on ML platform evolution, tooling, and engineering practice outside the core ASRA arc.
